data.name: SEX Cruise VR
data.detailed_description:
Ship in the ocean and you on this ship full of sexy naked girls.

During the game you move around the cruise ship in search of sexy girls.
You move around the ship using a teleport.
When you find a girl you can change her animations and positions and place her wherever you want.

you can also choose a night party where all the girls are in one place
remember that you control the girls and you can arrange them as you want.

Features:

- SEX
- naked girls
- change animations
- walking on the big cruise ship

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 3000 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
